PDMP — Prescription Drug Monitoring

PDMP Integration Active (Simulated)

In production, this integrates with your state's PDMP (e.g., Florida PDMP/AWARE, CSMD). All controlled substance prescriptions are automatically reported. Check is required before prescribing Schedule II–V drugs.
